title: Top-Down Cozy Moment (MacBook + Cat)
description: Cinematic bird's-eye view of a chic Turkish woman curled on a low sofa scrolling her MacBook, while her cat slowly walks toward her across the rug. No talking, no overlays — just the moment.

prompt.concept: A quiet, cinematic 'moment' captured from a perfectly top-down overhead angle, as if a camera is mounted on the ceiling directly above her. A chic Turkish woman is curled up on a low sofa or daybed scrolling on her MacBook, half-covered by a small lightweight cotton pike (Turkish throw), wearing a tank top and cozy socks. On the floor below her, her cat slowly walks toward her with soft, deliberate steps. No talking, no overlays — just the moment.

character.hair: long, loose beach waves, honey blonde, fanned out softly across the cushion (since we're shooting from above)
character.skin: warm fair-medium, glowy clean-girl makeup, dewy finish, soft blush, natural lashes, glossy nude lip
character.expression: calm, focused on her laptop screen, faint soft smile
character.vibe: Pinterest 'soft girl' / quiet luxury / cozy domestic moment

wardrobe.top: fitted ribbed tank top with thin spaghetti straps, plain cream or butter-yellow, no logos or text, hint of decolletage visible from the top-down angle
wardrobe.bottoms: soft loose lounge shorts or cropped sweatpants, neutral tone (barely visible under blanket)
wardrobe.socks: slouchy ribbed crew socks in cream or oat color, slightly bunched at the ankle, only the socked feet poking out from under the blanket
wardrobe.blanket: small lightweight Turkish cotton pike (thin throw), waffle-textured, off-white with subtle beige stripes, draped casually over her lower body up to her waist
wardrobe.jewelry: dainty gold layered necklaces, small gold hoops, one thin gold ring on her hand resting on the laptop

props.laptop: open Apple MacBook (silver or space gray), screen showing a softly glowing neutral interface with no readable text, logos, or brand marks (the Apple logo on the lid is hidden because the lid is open and away from camera)
near_her: ceramic mug of latte on a small marble side table
a hardcover book with a plain cloth cover
a folded second pike at the foot of the sofa
a small linen pillow under her head
on_the_floor: a single dried-flower stem in a small clay vase

cat.breed_look: fluffy domestic cat, soft cream or light grey fur, fluffy tail, calm posture
cat.position_start: lower-left of frame on the rug, a few feet away from the sofa
cat.movement: walks slowly and gracefully toward her, paws stepping softly, tail held in a relaxed upright curl
cat.position_end: reaches the side of the sofa near her hand and looks up briefly before pausing

details: low cream linen sofa or daybed with soft, deep cushions
soft beige boucle rug under the sofa
small marble side table with a ceramic latte mug
warm sunlight pooling diagonally across the floor and sofa from a tall window just out of frame
a few books and a candle visible at the edges of the frame
single dried pampas stem in a clay vase on the floor

camera.shot: perfect top-down overhead (bird's-eye view, 90 degrees straight down)
camera.rig_feel: as if a camera is mounted on the ceiling directly above her
camera.movement: completely locked off, no pan, no zoom, no drift
camera.framing: she occupies the upper two-thirds of the frame on the sofa, the rug and floor occupy the lower third, the cat enters from the bottom-left corner
camera.lens_feel: wide-ish lens to capture both her and the cat in one frame, gentle natural depth, everything mostly in focus
camera.focus: sharp on her face and hands, soft falloff at the frame edges

lighting.key: warm natural daylight from a tall window, casting a soft diagonal pool of light across her and part of the floor
lighting.mood: warm, golden, calm, slightly hazy, like late morning
lighting.highlights: soft glow on her hair, on the marble side table, and a faint warm patch where the sunlight hits the rug

action_timeline.beat: static overhead shot of her curled on the sofa, scrolling slowly on the MacBook with one hand, the other hand resting on the blanket
the cat appears walking slowly into the bottom-left of frame on the rug, taking soft, deliberate steps toward her
the cat continues approaching, tail gently swaying, while she keeps gently scrolling, oblivious for a moment
she notices the cat in her peripheral vision, the corner of her mouth lifts in a small smile, her hand drifts off the laptop slightly toward the cat
the cat reaches the edge of the sofa next to her hand, looks up, and the moment holds — she smiles softly down at it

ambient_sounds: very soft keyboard click or two
barely audible page-scroll sound from the laptop
a faint distant birdsong outside the window

no_text_no_graphics.logos: NONE (no Apple logo, no brand marks anywhere)
no_text_no_graphics.screen_content: MacBook screen shows a softly glowing neutral interface with no readable text or recognizable apps
no_text_no_graphics.note: deliver a clean plate — all text and graphics will be added later in CapCut

audio.ambient: soft cozy room tone, faint birdsong, gentle keyboard taps

negative_prompt: any camera movement, pan, or zoom
Apple logo or any brand marks
